completed_this_session: Fixed CloudKitSyncService launch crash: deferred CKContainer init to prevent SIGTRAP in simulator
Fixed CloudKit fetchAll: API returns named tuple (matchResults, queryCursor) not a dictionary
Fixed xcodegen wiping extension targets: added RAGFlowShareExtension + RAGFlowWidget to project.yml
Fixed signing errors: DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=LVK5C2V4J8 baked into all targets in project.yml permanently
Corrected team ID: 5FLM4GQ73L was wrong; confirmed working ID is LVK5C2V4J8 (Distribution)
Removed CoreML on-device embeddings: tokenizer was a stub producing garbage vectors — deferred
Removed useOnDeviceEmbeddings flag from LLMConfig, SettingsStore, RAGService, ChatViewModel, tests
Hidden iCloud sync toggle: CloudKit container not yet created in Apple Developer portal
Added GutenbergResolver: detects gutenberg.org/ebooks/{id} URLs, resolves to direct epub/txt download
Wired GutenbergResolver into LibraryViewModel.importFromURL() — transparent to non-Gutenberg URLs
GutenbergResolverTests: 10/10 passing including live network tests (Pride & Prejudice, Alice)
Archive confirmed clean: ARCHIVE SUCCEEDED with extensions embedded
Improved LLM error surfacing: ClaudeService.post() and OpenAIService now throw serverError with real HTTP status + API message instead of generic badResponse
ClaudeService: non-JSON 200 response shows first 200 chars of raw body for diagnosis
0.8.0 uploaded to TestFlight via Xcode Organizer (2026-04-16)
Added GEDCOM (.ged) import: new GEDCOMParser.swift parses individuals + families into text sections; routed through RAGService.ingestGED()
Added ZIP (.zip) import: RAGService.ingestZIP() unzips and ingests each contained supported file as a separate Book
Registered GEDCOMParser.swift in project.pbxproj
Added ged + zip to LibraryView supported import types, empty-state description, and LibraryViewModel scanDocumentsFolder auto-scan
GEDCOMParserTests: 17/17 passing — names, dates, places, family sections, notes, sex labels, CRLF/CR endings, file-based parse
next: Create iCloud.com.dhorn.ragflowmobile container in Apple Developer portal → enable iCloud sync
Gutenberg browser UI: in-app search by title/author (Level 3, optional)
Full MiniLM tokenizer via swift-transformers + .mlpackage conversion (deferred)
iCloud sync re-index prompt when pulling remote KBs

key_facts.archive_note: xcodebuild archive from terminal fails with errSecInternalComponent (keychain locked) — use Xcode GUI: set destination to Any iOS Device (arm64) via Product > Destination, then Product > Archive
